creator: pluknet@gmail.com
text:
as dependency with firmware module was added in dev/iwi.c 1.33 and MFCed to RELENG_6, so kernel does not build if "device iwi" presents in GENERIC.

Fix: 

sys/i386/conf/GENERIC should be updated in RELENG_6 with directive "device firmware".
How-To-Repeat: simply try to build kernel when "device iwi" presents in GENERIC.
